name: fasm2-studio
description: Syntax highlighting, autocomplete, hover docs, diagnostics and build tasks for flat assembler 2 (fasmg), compatible with classic flat assembler 1 sources.

fasm2Studio.defaultDialect.description: Dialect assumed for source files where the dialect cannot be auto-detected from their contents.

fasm2Studio.fasm2CompilerPath.description: Path to the fasm2/fasmg executable. Leave empty to auto-detect it on PATH.

fasm2Studio.fasm1CompilerPath.description: Path to the fasm1 (classic flat assembler) executable. Leave empty to auto-detect it on PATH.

fasm2Studio.diagnosticsEnabled.description: Compile in the background to show errors/warnings as you edit.

fasm2Studio.diagnosticsDebounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after you stop typing before re-running diagnostics.

fasm2Studio.buildOutputPath.description: Output path for the default Build task, relative to the source file's directory. Leave empty to use the source file name with its extension stripped.

fasm2Studio.gdbPath.description: Path to gdb, used by FASM: Debug. Leave empty to use "gdb" from PATH (e.g. from MSYS2/MinGW-w64 on Windows, or your distro's package on Linux).

file.description: Source file to assemble, relative to the workspace or absolute.

output.description: Output file path. Defaults to the source file name with its extension stripped.

dialect.description: Overrides auto-detected dialect for this task.

extraArgs.description: Additional command-line arguments passed to the compiler.

debugBuild.description: Injects the bundled listing macro (fasm2 only) so the FASM debugger can map addresses back to source lines.

program.description: Path to the assembled executable. Defaults to the source file name with its extension stripped.

listingFile.description: Path to the .lst listing produced by a debug build. Defaults to "<program>.lst".

gdbPath.description: Path to gdb. Leave unset to use "gdb" from PATH.

cwd.description: Working directory for the debugged program.

stopOnEntry.description: Stop at the program's first instruction.

configurationSnippets.label: FASM: Debug
configurationSnippets.description: Assemble the active file with debug listing info and launch it under gdb.
